_meta.stability: Frozen for the loom-generation lifetime per ADR-002.
_meta.relation_to_classic: Classic dashboard exposes only POST /api/issue/{id}/comments (no GET). Loom adds the GET counterpart and uses CommentRecordLoom (comment_id replacing classic id). Validates parent issue exists (404 NOT_FOUND if not) so missing issues do not silently return an empty list.

shape_decl.rationale: CommentRecordLoom = {comment_id, author, text, created_at}. Issue parent is validated upfront.

examples.name: issue_not_found
examples.note: Missing issue id → 404 NOT_FOUND. db.get_comments returns [] for unknown ids; the handler validates upfront so consumers see a real 404 instead of a misleading empty list.
